_notes: Hand-verified fan part-id mappings. The fan is an electronics axial cooling fan (60×60×10mm) imported from Onshape. The OBJ ships with generic mesh0..mesh94 names; the 7 blades all share 168 verts, the hub is mesh1 (1350 verts), the front/back frame plates are mesh81/mesh82 (60×60mm flat squares, 360 verts). Rotation axis is the Y axis (air-flow direction).
verification_method: color-segment by vertex-count bucket + render orthographic; the 168-vert bucket is the 7 blades
